result.summary: Found several visual layout issues, mostly related to horizontal clipping/overflow and fixed navigation overlapping page content.

issues.description: Game cards in the right column are cut off by the viewport. Multiple thumbnails and titles are only partially visible, making the page look horizontally overflowing rather than neatly responsive.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the mobile layout to fit the viewport, reduce card width/gutters, or make the carousel behavior clearer with proper scroll snapping and spacing.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen. Some game cards are hidden behind the navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content equal to the height of the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: The top category navigation is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontal carousel, add clearer scroll affordance or ensure the first visible set of tabs fits cleanly within the viewport.

issues.description: Some game artwork/text is truncated at the right edge, such as the partially visible 'Magnificent...' and other game cards.
issues.suggestion: Ensure card titles/artwork are not unintentionally cropped, or provide consistent carousel spacing so partial cards look intentional.
